message:
fix: stricter checkpoint deserialization and transactional save

Replace silently-swallowed JSON parse errors in checkpoint loading
with explicit error propagation via RestoreError::CorruptCheckpoint.
Previously, invalid terminal_state_json or agent_metadata_json would
silently produce None instead of surfacing corruption.

Also wrap checkpoint save in a database transaction to ensure the
INSERT into session_checkpoints and UPDATE of mux_sessions
last_checkpoint_at happen atomically. Extract checkpoint_id before
commit to avoid relying on last_insert_rowid after transaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
